name: Orion Properties Inc.
business: Orion Properties Inc. is an internally managed real estate investment trust (REIT) engaged in the ownership, acquisition, and management of a diversified portfolio of office properties located in high-quality suburban markets across the United States and leased primarily on a single-tenant net lease basis to creditworthy tenants. As part of our investment strategy, we intend to shift our portfolio concentration over time away from traditional office properties, towards more dedicated use assets with specialized uses that include an office component.

catalysts.sentence: On January 26, 2026, we entered into a cooperation agreement (the Cooperation Agreement) with one of our stockholders, The Kawa Fund Limited and its affiliate, Kawa Capital Management, Inc. (collectively, Kawa). Also on January 26, 2026, pursuant to the Cooperation Agreement, we commenced a review of strategic options for the Company.
The Cooperation Agreement will terminate on September 1, 2026.

On February 18, 2026, the Company entered into a credit agreement for the New Revolving Facility and the Original Revolving Facility was terminated and the indebtedness thereunder discharged and paid in full with borrowings under the New Revolving Facility.

Also during February 2026, the Company entered into an amendment to the CMBS Loan which, among other things, extended the maturity date two years until February 11, 2029, subject to two borrower extension options for a total of 18 months until August 2030 if certain conditions have been satisfied.

catalysts.event: Pending sale of eight non-core properties
catalysts.sentence: As of March 5, 2026, we had pending agreements in place to sell eight additional non-core properties for an aggregate gross sales price of $43.3 million, including the 37.4 acre Deerfield, Illinois properties where we completed the demolition of the six buildings during the fourth quarter of 2025 and our proportionate share of the gross sales price of one Arch Street Joint Venture operating property.
During February 2026, we acquired one 75,000 square foot property in Northbrook, Illinois for a gross purchase price of $15.0 million.

catalysts.event: Declaration of quarterly dividend for Q1 2026
catalysts.sentence: On March 4, 2026, the Company's Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share for the first quarter of 2026, payable on April 15, 2026 to stockholders of record as of March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Lease expirations representing 10.2% of annualized base rent in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Leases representing approximately 10.2% of our annualized base rent are scheduled to expire in 2026, and we could experience difficulties or delays renewing leases or re-leasing vacant space, which will increase our costs to operate and maintain such properties without receiving income.
